title: Interviews of Business Managers and Executive Search Professionals 2014-2015
description: The study investigated the recruitment of top management in listed and state-owned companies in Finland, particularly from the viewpoint of gender equality. The data consist of 19 interview transcripts. The interviewees included executive search professionals working in recruitment companies as well as high management of companies, for instance, members of the Board of Directors or human resources managers. One expert on state ownership steering was also interviewed. Data collection was part of
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
